results.title: Public support for PML-N growing strongly in GB: Azma Bokhari

results.title: Why Palestine solidarity groups at Celtic oppose Robbie Keane's return
results.description: Why Celtic’s Palestine solidarity groups oppose Robbie Keane’s potential return, citing his Maccabi Tel Aviv spell during the Gaza war and club fan culture.
